meaning: adj.澶氭皯鏃忕殑,澶氭皯鏃忓拰鐫︾浉澶勭殑
examples: We live in a multiracial society.
In Indiana, Iowa and South Dakota, the multiracial population increased by about 70 percent.
The islanders have free education and health care. Their multiracial society is pretty harmonious.
Woods, multiracial but identifiably black, triumphed in a sport dominated by upper-class white men.
Mahathir has now acknowledged that assimilation cannot succeed -- it is a multicultural, multiracial society.
